_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for webinars. Non-technical maintainers: add an object, commit. CI validates it; the site auto-sorts upcoming vs past by date and builds calendar links. Date = ISO YYYY-MM-DD. time_et like '12:00 PM'. series = 'Health' | 'GenAI'.

Health.label: Health Data Science Series
Health.tagline: Big-data & AI methods for health, imaging, genetics and clinical phenotyping.

GenAI.label: GenAI × Statistics Series
GenAI.tagline: Bridging the gap between generative AI and statistical methodologies.

talks.title: Deconstructing Alzheimer's Disease and Related Dementias to Enable Precision Medicine

talks.title: Leveraging LLMs for student feedback in introductory data science courses
